name: io.github.charlie-morrison/indie-founder-mcp
description: Aggregates Lemon Squeezy + Gumroad + Polar + Stripe revenue into one Claude-queryable view. summary_mrr, top_customers, refund_signal, recent_orders, export_csv_for_tax (Ukrainian FOP) — for solo founders who want to ask Claude 'what's my MRR?' instead of opening four dashboards.
title: Indie Founder Revenue MCP

environmentVariables.name: LS_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Lemon Squeezy API token (https://app.lemonsqueezy.com/settings/api). Required to enable the LS adapter.

environmentVariables.name: LS_STORE_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional Lemon Squeezy store ID filter. Without it, the adapter returns data from every store on the account.

environmentVariables.name: INDIE_FOUNDER_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport selector. One of: stdio (default), streamable-http, sse.

environmentVariables.name: INDIE_FOUNDER_MCP_LICENSE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Reserved for v0.2 paid-tier gating. Currently ignored.
